---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the framework did not behave as documented
title: ''
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the problem.

**Which skill**
e.g. cv-tailor, role-diagnosis, job-discovery.

**Steps to reproduce**
What you asked Claude, and what it did.

**Expected**
What the SKILL.md or references said should happen.

**Environment**
- Install method: project skills / global / Cowork / claude.ai
- Python version (if a render script was involved):
- OS:

**Important:** do not paste real personal data (your career file, contact
details, application history). Use placeholders. See SECURITY.md.
